title: table dependency inside union...
poc: create view v1 as (select * from t1 union select * from t2);
key_bug_features: selecting from dropped table in union view
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT, value FLOAT CHECK (value >= 0));
CREATE VIEW v1 AS (SELECT * FROM t1 UNION SELECT * FROM t2);
